checks.name: view_safety_ceiling
checks.description: View access is bounded by: active project, correct role (CR or PI), CR constraints (clearance>3, not HighlyRestricted, not Phase-3), PI constraints (riskScore<20, compliant device), and department match (unless GlobalAuditor)

checks.name: edit_safety_ceiling
checks.description: Edit access is bounded by: active project, correct role (CR or PI), CR constraints (clearance>3, not HighlyRestricted, not Phase-3), PI constraints (riskScore<20, compliant device), and department match (unless GlobalAuditor)

checks.name: cross_dept_block_view
checks.description: View is forbidden when user department != document projectManagingDepartment and user is not a GlobalAuditor

checks.name: cross_dept_block_edit
checks.description: Edit is forbidden when user department != document projectManagingDepartment and user is not a GlobalAuditor

checks.name: phase3_only_pi_view
checks.description: Phase-3 documents can only be viewed by PrincipalInvestigators (not ClinicalResearchers)

checks.name: phase3_only_pi_edit
checks.description: Phase-3 documents can only be edited by PrincipalInvestigators (not ClinicalResearchers)

checks.name: inactive_project_block_view
checks.description: Documents in non-active projects cannot be viewed

checks.name: inactive_project_block_edit
checks.description: Documents in non-active projects cannot be edited

checks.name: floor_pi_view
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with matching department, compliant device, low risk score, active project MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_pi_edit
checks.description: A PrincipalInvestigator with matching department, compliant device, low risk score, active project MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: floor_cr_view
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with matching department, clearance>3, non-HighlyRestricted, non-Phase-3, active project MUST be able to View

checks.name: floor_cr_edit
checks.description: A ClinicalResearcher with matching department, clearance>3, non-HighlyRestricted, non-Phase-3, active project MUST be able to Edit

checks.name: floor_auditor_cross_dept_view
checks.description: A GlobalAuditor+PrincipalInvestigator with compliant device, low risk, active project MUST be able to View even with mismatched department

checks.name: liveness_view
checks.description: View policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit
checks.description: Edit policy is not trivially deny-all

results.description: View access is bounded by: active project, correct role (CR or PI), CR constraints (clearance>3, not HighlyRestricted, not Phase-3), PI constraints (riskScore<20, compliant device), and department match (unless GlobalAuditor)
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: User::"", action: Action::"View", resource: Document::""
context: {isCompliantDevice: true, networkRiskScore: 9223372036854775807}
entities: [
  Role::"PrincipalInvestigator",
  Role::"ClinicalResearcher",
  Action::"Edit",
  Action::"View",
  Document::"" {
    classification: "",
    projectManagingDepartment: "",
    projectStatus: "Active",
    studyPhase: "Phase-3",
  },
  Role::"GlobalAuditor",
  User::"" in [Role::"ClinicalResearcher", Role::"PrincipalInvestigator"] {
    clearanceLevel: 9223372036854775807,
    department: "",
  },
]

results.description: Edit access is bounded by: active project, correct role (CR or PI), CR constraints (clearance>3, not HighlyRestricted, not Phase-3), PI constraints (riskScore<20, compliant device), and department match (unless GlobalAuditor)
results.counterexample:

results.description: View is forbidden when user department != document projectManagingDepartment and user is not a GlobalAuditor
Edit is forbidden when user department != document projectManagingDepartment and user is not a GlobalAuditor
Phase-3 documents can only be viewed by PrincipalInvestigators (not ClinicalResearchers)
Phase-3 documents can only be edited by PrincipalInvestigators (not ClinicalResearchers)
Documents in non-active projects cannot be viewed
Documents in non-active projects cannot be edited
A PrincipalInvestigator with matching department, compliant device, low risk score, active project MUST be able to View
A PrincipalInvestigator with matching department, compliant device, low risk score, active project MUST be able to Edit
A ClinicalResearcher with matching department, clearance>3, non-HighlyRestricted, non-Phase-3, active project MUST be able to View
A ClinicalResearcher with matching department, clearance>3, non-HighlyRestricted, non-Phase-3, active project MUST be able to Edit
A GlobalAuditor+PrincipalInvestigator with compliant device, low risk, active project MUST be able to View even with mismatched department
View policy is not trivially deny-all
Edit policy is not trivially deny-all

stages.name: semantic
stages.message: One or more semantic checks failed.
